sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Before my first breath, You knew my name
Every footstep planned, every heartbeat claimed
From sunrise to twilight, You're there with me
In shadows or light, Your love sets me free

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You know me deeper than the ocean floor
Every thought I think, and so much more
Your presence surrounds me, near and far
From mountain peaks to the furthest star

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: In the womb You formed me, piece by piece
Every fiber woven in perfect peace
Your artistry flows through all You design
Each day of my life, written line by line

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Where could I run from Your loving gaze?
Through darkest valleys or brightest days
Your hand will guide me, Your strength remain
In joy or sorrow, through sun or rain

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Search my heart, reveal what's true inside
Let Your wisdom be my faithful guide
Every morning brings Your mercies new
Lead me on the path that leads to You

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: You know me deeper than the ocean floor
Every breath I take, and so much more
Your presence holds me, guides my way
From first light until the close of day
